creator: dor.bsd@xm0.uk
text:
Created attachment 211697
net-mgmt/prometheus2: Update to 2.16.0

This patch updates net-mgmt/prometheus2 to v2.16.0, there are no breaking changes in this release. The release adds a few new features, and includes a number of enhancements and bug fixes.

A full changelog is available at: https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus/releases/tag/v2.16.0

-David
